proposals.description: Frost Nakamura proposes a colony improvement initiative

subsim_log.sexpr:
(let ((food 1.47)
              (water 0.85)
              (pop 6)
              (crisis 0.15)
              (trust 0.13))
          (let ((vote-sim (sub-sim 2
                  (let ((support (* trust (- 1.0 crisis)))
                        (opposition (* (- 1.0 trust) crisis)))
                    (if (> support opposition)
                      (list "proposal-passes" support)
                      (list "proposal-fails" opposition))))))
            (if (> crisis 0.7)
              (list "emergency-ration" vote-sim (* food 0.6))
              (list "governance-model" vote-sim trust))))

colonist_diaries.entry:
Year 36 — Nova (water)
Mood: hopeful. Event: Critical life support component fails.
Action: repair_hab. Colony morale: strained.

Year 36 — Frost Nakamura (water)
Mood: contemplative. Event: Critical life support component fails.
Action: propose. Colony morale: strained.

Year 36 — Nyx Patel (air)
Mood: contemplative. Event: Critical life support component fails.
Action: run_subsim. Colony morale: strained.
